# King Fahd Causeway

**Summary**: A bridge and road system connecting Saudi Arabia and Bahrain.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] studied the sedimentary deposits along the King Fahd causeway.

- [[2022-khan|Khan, 2022]] studied the core samples collected along the King Fahd Causeway.

- [[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988]] studied the sedimentary deposits along the King Fahd causeway to understand local sea level history.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] marine sedimentary basin

- [[2022-khan|Khan, 2022]] studied the core samples collected along the King Fahd Causeway.

- [[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988]] studied the sedimentary deposits along the King Fahd causeway to understand local sea level history.

## Formations Present

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] quaternary-sediments

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study area is located at the entrance of Gulf of Salwa (26 N-50 20 E). ([[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988, p. 28]])

- The study area is located in a semi-restricted marine area at the entrance of the Gulf of Salwa. ([[2022-khan|Khan, 2022, p. 33]])

- The study area is located at the entrance of Gulf of Salwa (26°N-50° 20 E). ([[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988, p. 28]])
